label: Tooltip
summary: A small yellow tip box on hover and focus, fed by a data-rs-tip attribute.
era: The little yellow tip that popped up beside the cursor when you hovered a toolbar button in 1997.

classes.name: rs-tooltip
classes.role: trigger class; the tip text lives in data-rs-tip

a11y: Shows on hover and keyboard focus alike, so the trigger must be focusable. Never essential content, the tip lives in a CSS pseudo-element.
